projectDescription: A comprehensive collection of pre-commit hooks that run code formatters and linters in parallel for 15+ languages
keyFeatures: Runs 20+ formatters and linters in parallel across 15+ programming languages
Docker-based for consistent formatting across all developer machines and CI
Zero configuration required - enforces Duolingo's code style automatically
Optimized Docker image precaching for faster pre-commit runs
AI rules synchronization across multiple AI coding assistants
Custom regex transformations for language-specific code cleanup
publicApiSurface: duolingo hook - Main code formatting hook
precache-docker hook - Docker image precaching optimization
Prettier v3.5.3 - CSS, HTML, JS, JSX, Markdown, Sass, TypeScript, XML, YAML
ESLint v9.23.0 - JavaScript and TypeScript linting
Ruff v0.7.3 - Python 3 formatting and linting
ClangFormat v18.1.8 - C++ and Protobuf formatting
